calendar.matters:
PETITION To Increase Petitioners Spousal Monthly Income Allowance And For Order Of Support For Petitioner From Community Property
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with Stella Von Klan.

Mr. Kato presented oral argument to support his position. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION To Increase Petitioners Spousal Monthly Income Allowance And For Order Of Support For Petitioner From Community Property

PETITION To Increase Petitioners Spousal Monthly Income Allowance And For Order Of Support For Petitioner From Community Property
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Continued To Dec-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trish Friebeberg for and with Stella Von Klan.

The Court stated that it wanted to see additional documentation with regard to the monthly expenses. The matter was continued to January 22, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
